_comment: To edit a product: change any field below and save. 'imageUrl' can be left empty (the photo script fills it) or paste any photo URL here to override. 'salePriceEGP' = null means no sale.
name: Monstera Albo
imageNote: Rare cultivar. Pexels may return the plain Monstera deliciosa instead. Paste a specific URL here if you have a better photo.
description: The collector's crown jewel - creamy variegated splits on every leaf. A little theatrical, endlessly rewarding.

name: Philodendron Patriciae
description: Long, ruffled leaves with a velvet-like texture. A statement piece that rewards patience with ever bigger foliage.

name: Monstera Adansonii Variegated
description: Swiss-cheese leaves with creamy white splashes. Trails beautifully from a high shelf or hanging basket.

name: Caramel Marble Philodendron
description: Warm caramel and cream marbling on glossy leaves. Every new unfurl is a small event.

name: Anthurium Clarinervium
description: Heart-shaped velvet leaves with silver veins that glow in soft light. Quiet drama at its finest.

name: Strawberry Shake Philodendron
imageNote: Rare cultivar. Paste a specific URL for best results - Pexels may return the wrong philodendron.
description: Pink, cream, and green variegation that looks like a painting. Each leaf is unique, none quite like the last.

name: Rhapis Palm
description: Elegant fan-shaped fronds on slender canes. One of the best large indoor palms - tolerates low light and is safe for pets.

name: Variegated Fiddle Leaf
description: The iconic fiddle-leaf with creamy white variegation. A bold corner plant that commands the room.

name: Alocasia Frydek Variegated
description: Velvety dark green leaves with white variegation and silver veins. A jewel of the Alocasia world.

name: Persian Shield
description: Iridescent purple and silver foliage that shimmers in dappled light. Effortlessly theatrical outdoors.

name: Alocasia Low Rider
description: A dwarf Alocasia that packs all the drama of its larger cousins into a compact, tabletop form.

name: Marble Queen Pothos
description: Cream and green marbled leaves on long, graceful vines. One of the most forgiving plants you can own.

name: Snake Plant Zeylanica
description: Architectural upright leaves with silver-green banding. Thrives on neglect. Perfect for busy plant parents.

name: Ficus Burgundy
description: Deep burgundy leaves that deepen to near-black in bright light. A bold, moody statement plant.

name: Aloe Vera
description: A household essential. Gel-packed leaves soothe minor burns, and it asks almost nothing in return.

name: Bonsai Tree
description: A living sculpture shaped over years. Each one is unique - patient art for the patient plant lover.

name: ZZ Plant
description: Glossy, deep green oval leaves on graceful arching stems. Practically impossible to kill - water it when you remember.

name: Peace Lily
description: White sail-like blooms above glossy green leaves. One of the best plants for cleaner indoor air.

name: Spider Plant
description: Arching green and cream striped leaves with cascading plantlets. Cheerful, fast-growing, and safe for cats and dogs.

name: Areca Palm
description: Feathery, tropical fronds that bring a holiday mood indoors. One of the top air-purifying palms, and pet-friendly.

name: Monstera Deliciosa
description: The classic split-leaf Monstera. Iconic, jungly, and an absolute joy to watch unfurl each new leaf.

name: Calathea Orbifolia
imageNote: Photo is a generic Calathea. Orbifolia has distinctive round silver-striped leaves. Paste a specific URL here for the best match.
description: Wide, round leaves with silver and green pinstripes. A calm, leafy presence that is gentle on pets and easy on the eye.

name: Calathea Medallion
description: Rounded leaves brushed with rose and deep green, purple underneath. The colour deepens in soft, even light.

name: Calathea Lancifolia
imageNote: Photo is generic foliage. Rattlesnake Calathea has long wavy leaves with dark spots. Paste a specific URL here for the best match.
description: Long, wavy leaves marked like a rattlesnake, with wine-red undersides. Lively, sculptural, and safe for pets.

name: Calathea White Fusion
imageNote: Stand-in photo of similar white-green variegated foliage. White Fusion is a rare cultivar. Paste a specific URL here for the best match.
description: Painterly white, green, and lilac variegation, no two leaves alike. A collector favourite that rewards steady humidity.

name: Syngonium Pink
imageNote: Stand-in pink houseplant photo. Syngonium Pink has soft pink arrowhead leaves. Paste a specific URL here for the best match.
description: Soft pink arrowhead leaves on a fast, forgiving grower. Pinches back easily to stay full and bushy.

name: Syngonium Albo Variegated
imageNote: Stand-in foliage photo. Albo Variegated has bold white splashes on green arrowheads. Paste a specific URL here for the best match.
description: Crisp white variegation splashed across green arrowhead leaves. A striking, collectible take on an easy classic.

name: Syngonium Neon Robusta
imageNote: Stand-in foliage photo. Neon Robusta has soft pink-green arrowhead leaves. Paste a specific URL here for the best match.
description: Fresh minty pink leaves that lighten as they unfurl. One of the easiest trailing plants to keep happy.

name: Aglaonema Red Valentine
imageNote: Please confirm this reads as an Aglaonema. Red Valentine has pink and red marbled leaves. Paste a specific URL here if you have a better photo.
description: Rosy pink and red marbling across broad green leaves. Brings warm colour to lower-light corners with very little fuss.

name: Aglaonema Silver Bay
description: Silvery green leaves with deep green edges. A robust, low-light champion that asks for little and gives plenty.

name: Aglaonema Pink Dalmatian
imageNote: Stand-in pink-green foliage photo. Pink Dalmatian has pink speckles on green leaves. Paste a specific URL here for the best match.
description: Green leaves freckled with bright pink, like spilled paint. A cheerful, easy-care pop of colour for shadier spots.

name: Begonia Maculata
description: Olive wings dotted with silver polka dots, deep red beneath. Also known as the Polka Dot Begonia, and a true showpiece.

name: Begonia Rex
imageNote: Stand-in foliage photo. Rex Begonia has swirled silver, purple, and green leaves. Paste a specific URL here for the best match.
description: Swirls of silver, plum, and emerald with a metallic sheen. Grown purely for its dramatic, jewel-toned leaves.

name: Begonia Maculata Variegated
imageNote: Photo shows a standard Maculata. The variegated form adds cream marbling and is rarer. Paste a specific URL here for the best match.
description: The polka dot Begonia with an extra layer of cream variegation. Rare, delicate, and worth the patience it asks for.

name: Echeveria
description: A rosette of blue-green leaves blushed with pink at the tips. Loves a sunny sill and asks for very little water.

name: Haworthia
description: Neat little rosettes with pearly stripes. One of the toughest, most forgiving succulents you can keep indoors.
imageNote: Generic succulent photo. Haworthia has translucent striped leaves. Add your own photo for the best match.

name: Jade Plant
description: The classic lucky plant, with plump jade-green leaves on woody stems. Grows slowly into a charming little tree.

name: String of Pearls
description: Delicate strands of round, pea-like beads that spill beautifully over a shelf or hanging pot.
imageNote: Photo is a mixed succulent tray. String of Pearls trails round bead-like leaves. Add your own photo for the best match.

name: Succulent Solo Pot
description: A single hand-picked succulent in a small pot. The easiest way to start, and a lovely little gift.
imageNote: Generic succulent photo. This is a single succulent in a small pot. Add your own photo for the best match.

name: Mini Echeveria Solo Pot
description: One perfect little Echeveria rosette in a small pot, ready to brighten a desk or windowsill.

name: Hand Painted Terracotta Pot
description: A terracotta pot painted by hand with warm, earthy patterns. Each one is a little different, just as it should be.

name: Hand Painted Ceramic Pot
description: A smooth ceramic pot finished with hand painted detail. A quiet, arty home for a favourite plant.
imageNote: Photo shows a plain ceramic pot. Ours is hand painted. Add your own photo to show the real design.

name: Hand Painted Pot Set
description: A set of three hand painted pots that sit beautifully together. A ready-made shelf in one buy.
imageNote: Photo is a group of terracotta pots. This is a matched hand painted set. Add your own photo for the best match.

name: Hand Painted Botanical Wall Art
description: A hand painted botanical piece to bring a little of the jungle onto your wall. Framed and ready to hang.
imageNote: Placeholder framed art photo. Ours is hand painted botanical. Add your own photo for the best match.

name: Leaf Wall Hanging
description: A soft, leafy wall hanging that adds texture and calm to any room. Handmade with care.
imageNote: Placeholder leaf photo. This is a woven leaf wall hanging. Add your own photo for the best match.

name: Hand Painted Wall Plaque
description: A small hand painted plaque with a leafy motif. A sweet finishing touch for a gallery wall.
imageNote: Placeholder foliage photo. This is a small hand painted plaque. Add your own photo for the best match.

name: Botanical Throw Cushion
description: A soft throw cushion in a leafy botanical print. The finishing touch for a cosy, plant-filled corner.
imageNote: Generic cushion photo. Ours has a botanical print. Add your own photo for the best match.

name: Leaf Print Cushion
description: Bold leaf print on a comfy, well-stuffed cushion. Brings the outdoors in, softly.
imageNote: Generic cushion photo. Ours has a leaf print. Add your own photo for the best match.

name: Scatter Cushion
description: A small scatter cushion in warm, natural tones. Layer it in for extra comfort and colour.
imageNote: Generic cushion photo. Add your own photo for the best match.

name: Plain Terracotta Pot
description: A simple, breathable terracotta pot. The honest classic that almost every plant is happy in.

name: White Ceramic Pot
description: A clean white ceramic pot that lets the plant do the talking. Suits any room and style.

name: Nursery Pot Set
description: A handy set of nursery pots for potting up, propagating, and growing on your new plants.
imageNote: Placeholder pot photo. This is a set of plastic nursery pots. Add your own photo for the best match.

name: All Purpose Potting Mix
description: A rich, ready-to-use mix that suits most houseplants. Just scoop, pot, and water.
imageNote: Photo shows soil being mixed. Ours comes ready in a bag. Add your own photo for the best match.

name: Cactus and Succulent Mix
description: A gritty, fast-draining blend made for succulents and cacti, so roots stay happy and never soggy.
imageNote: Photo shows potting soil. Add your own photo for the best match.

name: Premium Soil Mix
description: Our richest blend, with added nutrients for hungry, fast-growing plants. A treat for your leafy ones.
imageNote: Photo shows soil. Add your own photo for the best match.

name: Garden Tool Set
description: A tidy set of the essentials: trowel, fork, and more. Everything you need to pot and prune with ease.

name: Trowel and Gloves
description: A sturdy trowel and a comfy pair of gloves. The simple duo you will reach for again and again.

name: Repotting Kit
description: A little kit to make repotting stress-free: scoop, mat, and hand tools tucked together.
imageNote: Photo shows repotting in progress. Add your own photo for the best match.

name: All Purpose Fertilizer
description: A gentle, balanced feed for happy, leafy growth. A little goes a long way through the growing season.
imageNote: Photo shows feeding plants. Add your own photo for the best match.

name: Succulent Fertilizer
description: A light feed made for succulents and cacti, to keep colours bright and rosettes tidy.
imageNote: Placeholder gardening photo. This is succulent feed. Add your own photo for the best match.

name: Liquid Plant Food
description: An easy liquid food you mix into your watering can. Quick to use and loved by leafy plants.
imageNote: Placeholder photo. This is a liquid plant food. Add your own photo for the best match.

name: Wedding Bouquet
description: An elegant hand-tied bouquet of fresh blooms and soft greenery, made to order for your special day.

name: Bridal Centerpiece
description: A lush table centerpiece that turns any celebration into a garden. Arranged fresh, with love.

name: Wedding Plant Gift Set
description: A curated set of plants and keepsakes, wrapped as a gift. A living memory that lasts far beyond the day.
imageNote: Photo shows a florist at work. This is a curated plant gift set. Add your own photo for the best match.

name: Seasonal Flower Arrangement
description: A cheerful arrangement of whatever is freshest and most beautiful this season. Always a happy surprise.

name: Succulent Arrangement
description: A living arrangement of assorted succulents in one dish. Sculptural, long-lasting, and easy to love.

name: Mixed Greenery Arrangement
description: A calm, all-green arrangement of leaves and foliage. Understated and endlessly elegant.
imageNote: Placeholder florist photo. This is a mixed greenery arrangement. Add your own photo for the best match.
